sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 82:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 82:1
items.html: Disparity of form creates separation and distancing between spiritual things. Proximity of form creates in them adhesion. (Part 3, Chapter 10, item 1)
